message:
fix: defense-in-depth for duplicate tool names

Two additional layers of protection:

1. Anthropic adapter: strip function-type "web_search" from tool
   definitions when WebSearch is enabled, preventing the duplicate
   even if the caller passes one (defense at the wire-format layer).

2. rebuildToolDefsCache MCP loop: check `included` before adding
   MCP tools, preventing duplicates when an MCP tool name collides
   with a profile tool name.

Tests:
- Adapter-level: WebSearch + function "web_search" → no duplicate
  names in the request body
- MCP dedup: MCP tool with same name as profile tool → exactly 1
  entry in allToolDefinitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
